task_objective: Prevent stale game dropdown by enforcing a session-fresh cache refresh
design_decisions: Introduced a session-level _refreshed_once flag in SDHLudusaviService. The first time refresh_games or _match_game is called in a session (e.g., after boot or reload), the plugin now forces a full Ludusavi scan instead of trusting the disk-loaded JSON cache. This ensures system state synchronization while maintaining fast performance for subsequent calls.
results: Ghost games from previous reboots are now correctly removed on the first scan. Verified with a new unit test ensuring the first refresh bypasses cache and the second refresh utilizes it. Full test suite and quality checks are green.
